title: Enchantment crafts
description: Adds crafting recipes to all enchants in the game.
body:
# Enchantment Crafts

Enchantment Crafts is a Minecraft datapack that introduces a structured system for crafting enchanted books through custom recipes. Instead of relying purely on villagers, loot, or random enchantments, this datapack gives players a consistent and progression-based way to obtain enchantments.

---

## Features

* Craft enchanted books using custom recipes
* Full enchantment progression system
* Balanced survival-friendly gameplay
* Supports multiple 1.21.x versions
* Designed to work cleanly with vanilla mechanics

---

## How it works

This datapack replaces the randomness of traditional enchantment acquisition with crafting-based progression. Players unlock enchantments step by step through recipes and can then use them normally with anvils.

---

## Installation

1. Download the datapack
2. Place it into your world’s datapacks folder:
   `/saves/<your world>/datapacks/`
3. Run `/reload` in-game or rejoin your world

---

## Source code!

Source code --> [Github](https://github.com/DemandimngTim/Enchants/tree/main)

---

## Notes

* Make sure you are using the correct version for your Minecraft version
* Some mechanics may vary between snapshots and stable releases
* Check the changelog for recent updates and fixes

---

## Known Issues
Some versions may have incomplete enchantment support.
Compatibility may vary between snapshot and stable releases.
There was an issue where you couldn't use books in anvils but that got fixed in update 1.1.1
The bug is listed below:

![Good enchantment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/148c7a4be65096a8f0f1b7d09f673cd9feab1220.png)
![Bad enchantment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d978a19f9b2da77d8f4b173d31788a368bda3cdd.png)

Other bugs:

![Not every enchantment appearing bug](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62c32d8e29b96ace6419ca2135c286b9aaf166da.png)

---

---

## Other Stuff

This will eventually come out for 1.15.2

---

# CHANGELOG

---

## v0.0.1
The initial release. Not all recipes included and some recipes will be changed in the future.

---

## v0.1.0
The beta release. Added all remaining recipes, some enchantments will be changed in later updates.

---

## v1.0.0
The first "REAL" release. Polished some recipes and added support for versions from 1.21 to 1.21.11

---

## v1.1.0
Bug fix. Fixed a bug where the books can be used in anvils. Also added support for 26.1
